text: Roxette Arisa shines against a sparkling bokeh backdrop, in a light top and earrings.
original_text: Roxette Arisa stands against a sparkling bokeh background, wearing a light-colored top and subtle earrings. She gestures with her hands while speaking about the convenience and practicality of the makeup look she’s about to demonstrate.

text: Roxette Arisa holds up a smartphone with a timer app displayed on the screen.
original_text: Roxette Arisa holds up a smartphone with a timer app displayed on the screen, pointing at the time left with her finger. The glittering bokeh background remains consistent.

text: Roxette Arisa enhances her full eyebrows with Glossier Boy Brow.
original_text: Roxette Arisa applies the Glossier Boy Brow to her eyebrows, enhancing their fullness.

text: Roxette Arisa uses NARS Custard concealer, applying it to her face.
original_text: Roxette Arisa transitions to using the NARS Radiant Creamy Concealer in Custard, applying it to her face while discussing her skin concerns.

text: Roxette Arisa opens the compact powder and begins to apply it to her face using the brush
original_text: Roxette Arisa opens the compact powder and begins to apply it to her face using the brush.

text: Roxette Arisa blends powder evenly on cheeks and forehead.
original_text: Roxette Arisa focuses on blending the powder on her cheeks and forehead, ensuring an even application.

text: Roxette Arisa smooths a compact powder across her face with a big brush.
original_text: Roxette Arisa applies a compact powder to her face using a large makeup brush, ensuring an even finish.

text: Roxette Arisa sweeps blush across the apples of her cheeks.
original_text: Roxette Arisa applies blush to her cheeks with a brush, sweeping it across the apples of her cheeks. She holds the brush in her right hand and focuses intently on the application.

text: Roxette Arisa applies highlighter using a compact and brush.
original_text: Roxette Arisa demonstrates applying highlighter, holding a compact and a brush.

text: Roxette Arisa uses a makeup brush and applies product to her cheekbone.
original_text: Roxette Arisa picks up a makeup brush and applies product to her cheekbone, demonstrating the application technique.

text: Roxette Arisa curls her upper lashes with an eyelash curler, pressing gently, while holding a compact mirror in her left hand.
original_text: Roxette Arisa uses an eyelash curler on her upper lashes while holding a compact mirror in her left hand. She carefully presses the curler against her lashes.

text: Roxette Arisa applies lip product and shows the final result to the camera.
original_text: Roxette Arisa applies the lip product to her lips while looking into a compact mirror.

text: Roxette Arisa holds and shows the Urban Decay All Nighter makeup spray.
original_text: Roxette Arisa holds an Urban Decay All Nighter Makeup Setting Spray bottle, presenting it to the camera while speaking.

text: Roxette Arisa smiles warmly and smiles directly at the camera.
original_text: Roxette Arisa stands against a glittering background, smiling warmly at the camera. She speaks directly to the viewers, her expression animated as she summarizes the video content.
